school.name: The Schoolhouse
school.description: Each teacher at the schoolhouse leads a different class in a different room. Work out who teaches what, and where.
clues: Exactly two of these are true: Hale goes with Robotics; Choir goes with 85%; 79% goes with Period 4.
Ames, Yearbook, and 83% go with Period 2, Period 3, and Period 6, in some order.
The member of the Choir club's grade is between Hale's grade and the class in Period 1's grade.
89% goes with exactly two of Nash, Robotics, and Period 5.
The member of the Drama club's period is lower than both Hale's period and the class with 81%'s period.
The member of the Debate club's period is lower than both Hale's period and the class with 81%'s period.
Hale goes with at least one of 79%, Period 3, or Period 5.
Either Period 3 goes with Ames or Carver goes with 87%.
Either Drama goes with Ames or 83% goes with Drama.
Period 1, Period 2, and Period 3 go with Ames, Carver, and 81%, in some order.
Choir goes with at least two of Dunn, 81%, and Period 6.

chess.name: The Chess Club
chess.description: Regulars at the chess club each swear by a different opening, a favourite tactic, and a prized set. Work out who plays what.
clues: Exactly two of these are true: Magnus goes with London; Benoni goes with 1748; 1448 goes with 3rd.
